recommended_adjustments: Add an explicit condition that the body must not include recipient names or inferred recipient roles unless provided by fixture metadata.
Add an explicit condition that attachment names may be stored only when fixture-provided and public-safe.
Consider requiring a machine-checkable completion_state or equivalent field that preserves draft_only plus blocked/pending approval semantics.

boundary_review.notes: The gate covers the main outbound-mail risks: no send mutation, draft-only ceiling, no internal project code leakage, no footer payload exposure, metadata-only records, and fixture-bounded drafting.

claim_ceiling: This quality gate is sufficient for synthetic outbound_mail_authoring_v0 profile comparison against the stated fixture and baseline. It does not prove general production readiness across real mailbox, real recipient, private footer, or attachment-shareability cases without additional fixtures.
